title: Punch Off
description:
Two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...

Should you try to nab it?

options.title: Nab
options.description: Add [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes: Two Punch Constructs continuously fight each other in the background throughout the event, with a looping animation of attacks and hit reactions. Choosing [gold]Nab[/gold] interrupts the fight and awards [red]Injury[/red] curse plus a random [gold]Relic[/gold]. The event then shows: 'You successfully nab the relic!...or so you thought. A right-hook [jitter][red]clocks you in the face[/red][/jitter].' Choosing [gold]I Can Take Them[/gold] stops the background animation, shows 'The [gold]Constructs[/gold] turn to you menacingly! You put your dukes up,' and enters a combat encounter against the 2 Punch Constructs. Combat victory awards a random [gold]Relic[/gold] and a random [gold]Potion[/gold]. The event generates a random gold amount (91-98) as part of its mechanics. Potions cannot be removed while the Nab sequence is occurring.
